name: Quelling Blade
description: The axe of a fallen gnome, it allows you to effectively maneuver the forest.

abilities.name: Chop Tree
abilities.description: Instantly destroys the targeted tree. Cooldown: 4. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 350.

abilities.name: Quell
abilities.description: Grants the wielder bonus attack damage against non-hero units. Attack Damage Bonus: 8. Attack Damage Bonus: 4.
